purpose: Scan open PRs with settled failing CI and dispatch fix-ci comments.

capability.description: Runtime capability slug whose sidecar state is loaded and updated.

permissions.name: gh
permissions.usage: Reads PRs and posts fix-ci or stuck comments.

permissions.name: jq
permissions.usage: Filters PR JSON and builds next-state JSON.

success: auto-fix-ci completes and returns a valid canonical result
failure: auto-fix-ci cannot return a valid canonical result
